settings.title: What's included
settings.content: The 4-sided bar necklace and the matching coordinates ring, each laser-engraved with your place. Chain length, ring sizing (see the size chart), and care details go here.

settings.title: How engraving works
settings.content: 1. Enter your coordinates once (or tap “Find my coordinates”) — we lay them out on each piece exactly as engraved: latitude on the necklace front, longitude on the back, the full pair around the ring band. 2. Add up to two more necklace sides free, or give the ring its own line. 3. We send a photo proof of both pieces before the set ships.

settings.atc_label: Add to cart — free engraving on every piece
